mano_cua.result_summary: NuxtTurnstile 组件正常加载并成功渲染 Cloudflare Turnstile 验证码小部件。点击 Load Turnstiles 按钮后，两个 Turnstile widget 均成功渲染。控制台仅有 6 个 postMessage cross-origin 警告（Failed to execute 'postMessage' on 'DOMWindow'，因 challenges.cloudflare.com 与 localhost:3000 跨域，属本地开发环境正常现象）。未发现任何 JavaScript 错误，无 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading render)' 错误。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Turnstile widgets rendered successfully after clicking Load Turnstiles button. Console shows 6 warnings (all postMessage cross-origin warnings expected in localhost dev environment) but NO JavaScript errors. No 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading render)' error found anywhere in the console.
